creator: brian@brianwhalen.net
text:
In a 12.3 release system again with src and ports installed, I did a make install clean of the ccache port. This got me 3.7.12_2. The read me file for ccache leads off with the below.

To use ccache for ports and base, just add WITH_CCACHE_BUILD=yes to
/etc/make.conf. The rest of this guide is for building
/usr/src and other checkouts.

Refer to src.conf(5) for more information specific to base builds.

I tried adding a src.conf with identical text and it does not work.
